examples: We have all heard of toadstools and know that they are poisonous, but what many people don't know is that a toadstool is actually a mushroom.
Why is the fly or bug agaric toadstool so named?
Younger Scout, "How can I tell the difference between a mushroom and a toadstool?"
Securing an audience with Miyamoto in Japan is a little like trying to rescue Princess Toadstool.
